Lewis Cocking MP

Six Election Priorities

  • Tweet

I pledged to fight on 6 big issues if I was elected.

These now form the basis for my work as your Member of Parliament for Broxbourne.

Find out more.

News

An update on my priorities

Monday, 5 January, 2026
Happy New Year! At the General Election, I committed to work on six overarching local priorities.

One year as your MP

Friday, 4 July, 2025
Looking back on my first 12 months.

Speaking about local issues on my first podcast

Tuesday, 8 April, 2025
Discussing my campaigns to tackle roadworks, improve access to local services and secure a Banking Hub in Cheshunt.

Lewis Cocking for Broxbourne
